== Notes for [[Item:Q1926|Q1926]] ==

{geni:about_me}
<p>Vichitravirya (Sanskrit: विचित्रवीर्य, vicitravīrya) was a king in Indian Religious Texts. In the Mahabharata he was the younger son of queen Satyavati and king Shantanu and grandfather of the Pandavas and Kauravas.</p>
<p>----</p>
<p>BEFORE HE ATTAINED TO MAJARITY, CHITRANGADA, HAD BEEN SLAIN BY THE GANDHARVAS.</p>
<p>--------------------</p>
<p>As the name suggests(vichitra = strangeness), so not sure if he was weak or eunuch or homosexual. So, general perception was that he can't get a wife.</p>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D27C2791EFBBFC9A22EF79916BDFCD


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
